                def analyze_team_coverage(requests, start_date, end_date)
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                  # Analyze each day for coverage
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            

                  coverage = {}
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

                  current_date = start_date
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

            
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                  while current_date <= end_date
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

                    on_leave = requests.select { |r| r.start_date <= current_date && r.end_date >= current_date }
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

                    team_size = current_employee.team_members.count
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

            
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

                    coverage[current_date.to_s] = {
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

                      on_leave_count: on_leave.count,
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

                      team_size: team_size,
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

                      coverage_percentage: ((team_size - on_leave.count).to_f / team_size * 100).round(1),
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

                      critical: on_leave.count >= (team_size * 0.5) # 50%+ of team absent
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

                    }
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

            
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                    current_date += 1.day
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                  end

              def weekly_hours
          
      62.

              def build_calendar_weeks(start_date, end_date)
          
      62. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    62. 
            

            

                weeks = []
          
      63. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    63. 
            

            

                current_week = []
          
      64. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    64. 
            

            

            
          
      65. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    65. 
            

            

                # Start from the Monday before the first day of the month
          
      66. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    66. 
            

            

                date = start_date.beginning_of_week(:monday)
          
      67. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    67. 
            

            

            
          
      68. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    68. 
            

            

                # End on the Sunday after the last day of the month
          
      69. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    69. 
            

            

                end_loop = end_date.end_of_week(:sunday)
          
      70. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    70. 
            

            

            
          
      71. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    71. 
            

            

                while date <= end_loop
          
      72. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    72. 
            

            

                  current_week << {
          
      73. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    73. 
            

            

                    date: date,
          
      74. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    74. 
            

            

                    in_current_month: date.month == start_date.month,
          
      75. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    75. 
            

            

                    is_today: date == Date.current
          
      76. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    76. 
            

            

                  }
          
      77. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    77. 
            

            

            
          
      78. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    78. 
            

            

                  if date.wday == 0 # Sunday
          
      79. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    79. 
            

            

                    weeks << current_week
          
      80. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    80. 
            

            

                    current_week = []
          
      81. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    81. 
            

            

                  end
          
      82. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    82. 
            

            

            
          
      83. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    83. 
            

            

                  date += 1.day
          
      84. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    84. 
            

            

                end
          
      85. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    85. 
            

            

            
          
      86. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    86. 
            

            

                weeks << current_week unless current_week.empty?
          
      87. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    87. 
            

            

                weeks
          
      88. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    88.

                  # Easter calculation (Computus algorithm)
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            
              1
            

            

                  def easter_sunday(year)
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            
              396
            

            

                    a = year % 19
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            
              396
            

            

                    b = year / 100
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            
              396
            

            

                    c = year % 100
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            
              396
            

            

                    d = b / 4
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            
              396
            

            

                    e = b % 4
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            
              396
            

            

                    f = (b + 8) / 25
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            
              396
            

            

                    g = (b - f + 1) / 3
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            
              396
            

            

                    h = (19 * a + b - d - g + 15) % 30
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            
              396
            

            

                    i = c / 4
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            
              396
            

            

                    k = c % 4
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            
              396
            

            

                    l = (32 + 2 * e + 2 * i - h - k) % 7
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269. 
            
              396
            

            

                    m = (a + 11 * h + 22 * l) / 451
          
      270. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    270. 
            
              396
            

            

                    month = (h + l - 7 * m + 114) / 31
          
      271. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    271. 
            
              396
            

            

                    day = ((h + l - 7 * m + 114) % 31) + 1
          
      272. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    272. 
            

            

            
          
      273. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    273. 
            
              396
            

            

                    Date.new(year, month, day)
          
      274. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    274. 
            

            

                  end

    275. 
            

            

            
          
      276. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    276. 
            
              1

              def process_employee(employee, organization, week_start, week_end)

                def resolve
          
      41. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    41. 
            

            

                  if user.hr_or_admin?
          
      42. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    42.

      43. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    43. 
            

            

                  elsif user.manager?
          
      44. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    44. 
            

            

                    # Managers see their team's schedules + their own
          
      45.

      46.

    47. 
            

            

                    # Employees see only their own

      49.

      50.

                def generate_csv(headers, rows)
          
      26. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    26. 
            

            

                  CSV.generate(col_sep: ';', force_quotes: true, encoding: 'UTF-8') do |csv|
          
      27. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    27. 
            

            

                    # Add UTF-8 BOM for Excel compatibility
          
      28. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    28. 
            

            

                    csv << ["\uFEFF#{headers.first}"] + headers[1..-1]

    29. 
            

            

            
          
      30. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    30.

    32. 
            

            

                    end
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33. 
            

            

                  end

                # Format duration in hours (e.g., "7.5" or "7h30")
          
      49. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    49. 
            

            

                def format_duration_hours(seconds)
          
      50. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    50. 
            

            

                  return '' if seconds.nil? || seconds.zero?
          
      51. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    51. 
            

            

                  hours = seconds / 3600.0
          
      52. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    52. 
            

            

                  hours.round(2).to_s.sub('.', ',') # French decimal separator
          
      53. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    53. 
            

            

                end
          
      54. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    54.

    55. 
            

            

                # Format duration as HH:MM

    56.

      57. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    57. 
            

            

                  return '' if seconds.nil? || seconds.zero?
          
      58. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    58. 
            

            

                  hours = seconds / 3600
          
      59. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    59.

    60. 
            

            

                  format('%02d:%02d', hours, minutes)

                  start_date, end_date = date_range

    81. 
            

            

                        entries = entries.where(validation_status: 'rejected')
          
      82. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    82. 
            

            

                      end
          
      83. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    83. 
            

            

                    end
          
      84. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    84. 
            

            

                  end
          
      85. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    85. 
            

            

            
          
      86. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    86. 
            

            

                  # Apply Ruby filters that require loading records (converts to array)
          
      87. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    87. 
            

            

                  if @filters[:only_late] == '1' || @filters[:only_late] == true
          
      88. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    88. 
            

            

                    entries = entries.to_a.select { |e| e.respond_to?(:late?) && e.late? }
          
      89. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    89. 
            

            

                  end
          
      90. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    90. 
            

            

            
          
      91. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    91. 
            

            

                  entries
          
      92. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    92. 
            

            

                end
          
      93. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    93. 
            

            

            
          
      94. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    94. 
            

            

                def build_row(employee, entry)
          
      95. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    95. 
            

            

                  [
          
      96. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    96. 
            

            

                    employee.last_name,
          
      97. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    97. 
            

            

                    employee.first_name,
          
      98. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    98. 
            

            

                    format_date(entry.worked_date),
          
      99. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    99. 
            

            

                    format_datetime(entry.clock_in),
          
      100. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    100. 
            

            

                    format_datetime(entry.clock_out),
          
      101. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    101. 
            

            

                    format_duration_hours(entry.duration_seconds),
          
      102. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    102. 
            

            

                    calculate_late_minutes(entry),
          
      103. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    103. 
            

            

                    calculate_overtime(entry),
          
      104. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    104. 
            

            

                    validation_status_text(entry),
          
      105. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    105. 
            

            

                    entry.validated_by&.full_name || '',
          
      106. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    106. 
            

            

                    format_datetime(entry.validated_at),
          
      107. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    107. 
            

            

                    entry.notes || ''
          
      108. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    108. 
            

            

                  ]
          
      109. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    109. 
            

            

                end
          
      110. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    110. 
            

            

            
          
      111. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    111. 
            

            

                def calculate_late_minutes(entry)
          
      112. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    112. 
            

            

                  return '' unless entry.respond_to?(:late?) && entry.late?
          
      113. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    113. 
            

            

            
          
      114. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    114. 
            

            

                  # Assuming schedule start time is stored or we have a method to get it
          
      115. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    115. 
            

            

                  # For now, return empty string as schedule is not fully implemented
          
      116. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    116. 
            

            

                  if entry.employee.work_schedule&.starts_at
          
      117. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    117. 
            

            

                    schedule_start = entry.employee.work_schedule.starts_at
          
      118. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    118. 
            

            

                    actual_start = entry.clock_in.strftime('%H:%M')
          
      119. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    119. 
            

            

            
          
      120. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    120. 
            

            

                    # Simple calculation - needs work_schedule to be accurate
          
      121. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    121. 
            

            

                    late_seconds = entry.clock_in.seconds_since_midnight - schedule_start.seconds_since_midnight
          
      122. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    122. 
            

            

                    (late_seconds / 60).to_i.to_s if late_seconds > 0
          
      123. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    123. 
            

            

                  else
          
      124. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    124. 
            

            

                    ''
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125. 
            

            

                  end
          
      126. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    126. 
            

            

                rescue StandardError
          
      127. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    127. 
            

            

                  ''
          
      128. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    128. 
            

            

                end
          
      129. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    129. 
            

            

            
          
      130. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    130. 
            

            

                def calculate_overtime(entry)
          
      131. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    131. 
            

            

                  return '' unless entry.duration_seconds
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            

            

            
          
      133. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    133. 
            

            

                  # French law: 35h per week, anything over 7h/day could be overtime
          
      134. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    134. 
            

            

                  # This is simplified - real calculation needs weekly context
          
      135. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    135. 
            

            

                  daily_limit = 7 * 3600 # 7 hours in seconds
          
      136. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    136. 
            

            

                  overtime_seconds = entry.duration_seconds - daily_limit
          
      137. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    137. 
            

            

            
          
      138. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    138. 
            

            

                  if overtime_seconds > 0
          
      139. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    139. 
            

            

                    format_duration_hhmm(overtime_seconds)
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            

            

                  else
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            

            

                    ''
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142. 
            

            

                  end
          
      143. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    143. 
            

            

                end
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144. 
            

            

            
          
      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145. 
            

            

                def validation_status_text(entry)
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            

                  if entry.respond_to?(:validation_status)
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            

            

                    case entry.validation_status
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            

                    when 'pending'
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            

                      'En attente'
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            

                    when 'validated'
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            

            

                      'Validé'
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            

            

                    when 'rejected'
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            

            

                      'Refusé'
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            

                    else
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            

                      'Non validé'
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            

                    end
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            

            

                  else
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            

                    'Non validé'
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

                  end
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

                end
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

              end
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            

            end
          
      163.
